title: T-002 — license_plates table migration
prompt:
# T-002 — license_plates table migration

PRD: `05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md` §5.2.
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`.

## Goal
Create `license_plates` table with all PRD §5.2 columns, constraints, RLS column, ext/private JSONB, and audit columns.

## Implementation contract
Add Drizzle schema `packages/db/src/schema/license-plates.ts` referencing enums from T-001. Columns per §5.2: id, tenant_id, lp_number, warehouse_id, location_id, product_id, item_type_snapshot, quantity (decimal(14,4)), uom (varchar 8), catch_weight_kg (decimal(10,3)), status, qa_status, batch_number, supplier_batch_number, gtin (varchar 14), manufacture_date, expiry_date, shelf_life_mode_snapshot enum (use_by/best_before), date_code_rendered, source enum, grn_id, wo_id, parent_lp_id, pallet_id, po_number, reserved_for_wo_id, reserved_qty, consumed_by_wo_id, consumed_at, locked_by, locked_at, ext_jsonb, private_jsonb, created_at/by, updated_at/by.
Constraints: UNIQUE(tenant_id, warehouse_id, lp_number); CHECK(quantity >= 0); CHECK(reserved_qty <= quantity); FK reserved_for_wo_id nullable.
Do not add indexes here (T-011 owns indexes). Do not enable RLS policy here (T-012 owns RLS).

## Files (scope)
- packages/db/src/schema/license-plates.ts [create]
- packages/db/migrations/0NN_license_plates.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/license-plates.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration runs, when `\d license_plates` is inspected, then all PRD §5.2 columns are present with declared types.
2. Given an INSERT with quantity=-1, when committed, then DB raises a CHECK violation (quantity >= 0).
3. Given two rows insert with same (tenant_id, warehouse_id, lp_number), when committed, then DB raises unique violation.

## Test strategy
- RED: license-plates.test.ts using a tx with rollback that asserts CHECK and UNIQUE violations.
- Run `pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test license-plates`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not weaken CHECK or UNIQUE constraints.
- Do not add columns beyond §5.2.
- Do not depend on later tables (grn, wo) — keep FKs nullable.

pipeline_inputs.description: Create license_plates Drizzle table + SQL migration with all §5.2 columns, CHECK and UNIQUE constraints; no indexes or RLS yet.
pipeline_inputs.details: Add packages/db/src/schema/license-plates.ts and accompanying migration. Use enums from T-001. Constraints: UNIQUE(tenant_id, warehouse_id, lp_number); CHECK(quantity >= 0); CHECK(reserved_qty <= quantity). FK reserved_for_wo_id nullable. ext_jsonb + private_jsonb default '{}'. Audit columns created_at/by, updated_at/by. Indexes deferred to T-011. RLS policy deferred to T-012.
out_of_scope: No FK to grns/work_orders (kept nullable in this task)
acceptance_criteria: Given the migration runs, when '\d license_plates' is run, then every column listed in PRD §5.2 exists with matching type
Given INSERT with quantity=-1 runs, when committed, then DB raises a CHECK violation
Given two INSERTs share (tenant_id, warehouse_id, lp_number), when the second commits, then it fails with a unique violation
test_strategy: RED: license-plates.test.ts asserts CHECK and UNIQUE violations via tx rollback
Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test license-plates' and capture results
risk_red_lines: Do not collapse UNIQUE to (warehouse_id, lp_number) without tenant_id
Do not add columns not in PRD §5.2
